content: The Scout Movement is divided into branches by age: 1. Lobinho (Cub Scout, 6.5-10 yrs) - Focus on socialization and fantasy (Jungle Book). 2. Escoteiro (Scout, 11-14 yrs) - Focus on anatomy, patrol system, and exploration. 3. Sênior (Senior, 15-17 yrs) - Focus on challenge, physical, and intellectual development. 4. Pioneiro (Rover, 18-21 yrs) - Focus on service (Lema: Servir) and life project.
